member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource)
member.summary: Wraps an in a type that exposes container extension methods.
member.param: The inner resource used to store annotations.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource
member.summary: A resource that represents Azure App Configuration.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: A resource that represents Azure App Configuration.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource.IsEmulator
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the Azure App Configuration resource is running in the local emulator.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource.Endpoint
member.summary: Gets the appConfigEndpoint output reference for the Azure App Configuration resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure App Configuration resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure AppConfiguration resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.AddAzureAppConfiguration(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure App Configuration resource to the application model.
member.param: The .
The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.
member.remarks:
By default references to the Azure App Configuration resource will be assigned the following roles:
-
These can be replaced by calling .

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.RunAsEmulator(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure App Configuration resource to be emulated. This resource requires an to be added to the application model.
member.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the / container image.
member.param: The Azure App Configuration resource builder.
Callback that exposes underlying container used for emulation to allow for customization.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.WithDataBindMount(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a bind mount for the storage of an Azure App Configuration emulator resource.
member.param: The builder for the .
Relative path to the AppHost where emulator storage is persisted between runs. Defaults to the path '.aace'

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.WithDataVolume(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource},System.String)
member.summary: Adds a named volume for the data folder to an Azure App Configuration emulator resource.
member.param: The builder for the .
The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.WithHostPort(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Configures the host port for the Azure App Configuration emulator is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.
member.param: Builder for the Azure App Configuration emulator container
The port to bind on the host. If is used, a random port will be assigned.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.WithRoleAssignments``1(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{``0},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationResource},Azure.Provisioning.AppConfiguration.AppConfigurationBuiltInRole[])
member.summary: Assigns the specified roles to the given resource, granting it the necessary permissions on the target Azure App Configuration resource. This replaces the default role assignments for the resource.
member.param: The resource to which the specified roles will be assigned.
The target Azure App Configuration resource.
The built-in App Configuration roles to be assigned.
member.returns: The updated with the applied role assignments.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureAppConfigurationExtensions.WithAnonymousAccess(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureAppConfigurationEmulatorResource},System.String)
member.summary: Configures anonymous authentication for the Azure App Configuration emulator resource.
member.param: The resource builder for the Azure App Configuration emulator.
The role to assign to the anonymous user. Defaults to "Owner".
member.returns: The updated resource builder for further configuration.
